subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Verily, We have desired to make mention of thee and remember thee for the sake of God, the Lord of all worlds, and We counsel thee to trustworthiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم انا اردنا ان نذکرک و نذکرک لوجه الله رب العالمین و نوصیک بالامانه
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @prayer for pilgrims, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
